title: Temporary repair expiry label
summary: Write the defect, temporary method, load limit, forbidden uses, installer, date, inspection interval, and replacement deadline directly beside the repair.
content: Write the defect, temporary method, load limit, forbidden uses, installer, date, inspection interval, and replacement deadline directly beside the repair. Remove the item from service when the limit cannot be enforced. Do not hide a temporary repair under paint, tape, furniture, or a new cover.
